commits.message: fix: What-If UX improvements — entities, risk, depth, diagram, history detail
fix: What-If explanation — signal names now readable (pp-narrative code color)
feat: What-If impact explanation + analysis history (Phase 46-H)
feat: P47-A — GET /api/parallax/signals/batch endpoint for Saras Diagnostic Analyzer
feat: Phase 46-G — /ask /chat parallax wiring + skill collector injection
fix: /parallax graph overlap — render in preset then reflow after container measures size; add Shuffle button; resize on tab switch
fix: /parallax namespace parity with portal — full=true on diagram/namespaces API; cached/live status on C4 diagrams; remove redundant pxPopulateCyNs
feat: upgrade /parallax Graph tab to match portal — fcose layout, ECU clusters, depth+trace BFS; fix C4 Trace hint text for app names
fix: clear stale ECU Cluster View text; interactive graph panel subtitle updated
fix: rename 'ECU Cluster View' heading to 'Interactive Graph' on #graph panel
fix: portal header 'Main UI' link points to / not /docs
fix(parallax/whatif): diagram/blast also searches all node types
fix(parallax/whatif): blast-radius works for app names, elpis PDUs and zonal ECUs
fix(parallax/signal-flow): expand all app_refs rows as BFS roots, fix root labels
feat(parallax/clustered): signal search + depth + trace flow in ECU cluster view
fix(parallax): serve fcose + deps locally — no CDN dependency
fix(parallax): register cytoscape-fcose plugin via cytoscape.use()
feat(parallax): fcose layout + box-select + ECU cluster view
feat(parallax): MCP tools + /query API + docs merge
feat(parallax): unified bridge tables + sort/filter on all tables
fix(parallax): overview stats show correct counts from DB
fix(parallax): What-If blast radius + C4 diagram real SVG rendering
feat(parallax): diagram narrator + HuggingFace offline fix
feat(parallax): diagram modal + pan/zoom + natural SVG rendering
feat(parallax): C4 diagram store + source/diagram toggle + service node fix
feat(parallax): signal-flow search — bidirectional BFS across all namespaces
fix(parallax): G2b bridge FK — normalize underscore differences between YAML and RAL names
fix(parallax): orchestrator path + app node dedup by app_name in graph
fix(parallax): remove duplicate app_refs + correct eth_frame edge types
fix(parallax): restore missing #pp-cy canvas div in graph panel
fix(parallax): complete 4-layer chain in portal UI + C4 diagrams
feat(parallax): G1+G2+G3 — full App→RVM→Elpis→Zonal chain
fix(parallax-portal): tool panels not showing (inline style > CSS class)
fix(parallax-portal): fix blank interactive graph panel
feat(parallax-portal): consolidate all views into /parallax/portal as JS panels
fix: parallax portal 500 error -- Request injection + module-level import
feat: /parallax/portal is now a proper docs-portal-style standalone page
fix: /parallax/portal now own page + blast diagram PlantUML syntax
fix: parallax interactive graph -- RealDictCursor zip bug + schema column alignment
fix(parallax): restore missing closing quote in Component() labels
fix(parallax): PlantUML Unicode/syntax fixes in C4 diagram generator
feat(parallax): staleness check, auto-scan endpoint, fix RealDictCursor + JAR output naming
feat(parallax-46b): C4 PlantUML signal diagrams via local JAR
feat(parallax): git provenance capture — scan_runs, repo_refs, file_manifest
fix: scope parallax tracer to v1_0 only — remove v2_1 paths
feat: Parallax Tracer hackathon scaffolding — Day 1+2 ready
docs: Parallax Tracer hackathon concept v3
feat(phase-42-p0): Parallax + SysML v2 plugin skeletons + portal nav merge
